description: The Oda-gumi is a yakuza organization founded in 1958 by Hideomi 'Joji' Oda in Osaka, Japan. It operates as a subsidiary of the Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate. The group has been involved in internal conflicts and leadership disputes, and has faced legal issues including arrests of its leaders. As of 2021, its future is uncertain due to leadership demotions and ongoing troubles.
